meditations.title: Mental Training
meditations.description: Guided meditation sessions to complement your physical training.
meditations.browserNotSupport: Your browser does not support the audio element.
meditations.med_desc_1: A grounding practice designed to establish conscious connection with the body and environment. The goal is to transition from mental activity to deep relaxation and receptivity, using abdominal breathing to nourish cells and release tension, preparing the being for new beginnings with greater clarity.
meditations.med_desc_2: An internal visualization journey that travels the body from the feet to the crown. It seeks to balance the physical and energetic body through a "warm light" that softens each muscle. The result is a feeling of grounding and higher connection, ideal for recovering harmony before continuing with daily activities.
meditations.med_desc_3: Technique focused on "three-time breathing" (low, middle and high) to explore and expand lung capacity. The goal is to generate an internal "wave" of calm and focus, using counting and visualization to completely empty the lungs and fill them with new vitality, reaffirming presence in the present moment.
meditations.med_desc_4: Based on the "box breathing" technique (4-4-4-4), this meditation acts as an interface to reset the nervous system. It seeks to balance the fight-or-flight response, bringing the heart and brain to a state of physiological coherence. The perfect tool to regain emotional control and calm in stressful situations or before a great challenge.
meditations.med_desc_5: A deep relaxation experience that uses a guided warm light visualization to travel the body from feet to head. The goal is to identify and release accumulated pain or tension points, allowing the physical body to soften and surrender to a state of total comfort. The ideal practice to restore well-being after an exhausting day or physical strain.
meditations.med_desc_6: A vibrant journey through the seven main energy centers. Through the use of colors and conscious breathing, this meditation seeks to unblock vitality, creativity, and confidence. By aligning each point—from the stability of the root to the clarity of the crown—the practitioner becomes a channel of clean energy, fully prepared to face objectives and challenges with renewed focus.
